base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sword_slash_violet — a effect_layer from 1986 dragon quest. enemy critical-strike or magical weapon variant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 5-frame violet slash — enemy critical-strike or magical weapon variant
